mapper.select: SELECT st.*,s.uShopName FROM uStorage st LEFT JOIN uShop s ON st.uShopCode=s.uShopCode ORDER BY st.uShopCode
SELECT st.*,s.uShopName FROM uStorage st LEFT JOIN uShop s ON st.uShopCode=s.uShopCode WHERE st.uShopCode=#{shopCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE uStorage SET uNum=uNum+#{param2} WHERE uShopCode=#{param1}
UPDATE uStorage SET uNum=uNum-#{param2} WHERE uShopCode=#{param1}
